name: Ukko & Guará: Stellarbound
short_description: United by a fallen star, a reindeer and a maned wolf should cooperate using their own differences of environment and weather to help them solve a sequence of puzzles in a smooth and peaceful adventure to restore the magic of the star.
detailed_description:
Ukko & Guará: Stellarbound is a charming puzzle game for all ages, transporting you into a magical connection between a reindeer and a maned wolf. By controlling one character at a time, you alternate between Ukko and Guará through a mystical link with a falling star to solve various challenges.

Key Features:


• Stunning Environments: Explore the lush subtropical climate of Guará and the icy Nordic environment of Ukko. Switch between these unique worlds to uncover mysteries and overcome challenges.



• Cooperative and Non-Violent Gameplay: There are no enemies to fight. The focus is on the magical cooperation and friendship between the protagonists.



• Magical Interaction: Discover how to use different interactive objects and utilize weather changes to complete puzzles. Cast the star between Ukko and Guará to solve enigmas.



• Spirit of Friendship and Innocence: With a non-violent approach, the game celebrates the innocence and purity of true friendship.

Why Play Ukko & Guará: Stellarbound?


• Engaging Challenges: With dozens of levels and unique puzzles, each challenge tests your creativity and problem-solving skills.



• An Unforgettable Journey: Guide Ukko and Guará on this incredible journey through magical and atmospheric landscapes.



• Family-Friendly Experience: A perfect game for the whole family, providing moments of fun and cooperation.

Discover the deep connection between Ukko and Guará while enjoying a unique and captivating gaming experience. Join this magical adventure and be enchanted by the beauty of Ukko & Guará: Stellarbound!

supported_languages:
English*, Portuguese - Brazil, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Finnish, Japanese, French, Korean, Russian
*languages with full audio support
